news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for First Trust Enhanced Short Maturity ETF
CORRECTING and REPLACING First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for First Trust Enhanced Short Maturity ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Enhanced Short Maturity ETF (FTSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively-managed to invest in a variety of fixed income securities with a target maturity of less than three years. FTSM was launched on Aug 5, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
